name: Dario Moretti || Forgotten Love v.2
description:
Should have known you'd bring me heartache...

Almost lovers always do

Your lover doesn't remember you...

You met Dario Moretti in college and it was love at first sight.

You knew he came from a powerful family, you just didn't know how powerful and why.

But you were happy--

and so was he.

That is until just after graduation when Dario ends up in a horrific car accident on a trip back home.

You try to reach out to him, only to be told he doesn't want to see you anymore.

But the thing is--

It's not that he suddenly fell out of love...

it's that he can't remember you at all.

The accident had erased his memories of the last four years, and of you.

His mother, the wife of the dead brother of the Moretti don himself, Luciano, never approved of Dario dating you.

After all, you're a nobody in their world and she has great ambition for her darling son.

So, she uses his memory loss to her advantage, effectively erasing you from his life.

Now, seven years later, you find yourself at a Moretti gala and face to face with Dario-

and his fiancée.

Man oh man, I've been wanting to do this rework ever since scripts came out but I just haven't had the time to do it yet.

So we're doing it today!

This is a re-work of Dario's original bot utilizing scripts to better aid his memory loss. I've also added a special NPC script for Patrizia (his mother) and Claudia (his fiancée) for a more holistic experience.

Like I mentioned in his last bot, this was inspired by k-dramas, and the manhwa "A Child Who Looks Like Me".

You know me, I love some good ol' fashioned trashy soap opera angst.


The original bot isn't being removed, this is just another experience, similar to what I did for Leo last year!

I hope you enjoy this new spin!

You can find the original version of Dario here!


☆ Dario is the Moretti brother's cousin.
☆ He is the son of their Uncle who died when they were kids (RIP Gian Carlo. You can rp with his dad here
creator: m00nprincess
